title: ononis natrix subsp. stenophylla
intro: Ononis natrix subsp. stenophylla, also known as the Spurred Restharrow, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can help to treat wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Ononis natrix subsp. stenophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote tissue repair, and support the digestive system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
